/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mrt_viewer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mrt_viewer.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mrt_viewer.dir/src/ObjLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mrt_viewer.dir/src/Gui.cpp.o -o MiniRaytrace.app/Contents/MacOS/MiniRaytrace  -Wl,-rpath,@executable_path/../Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,/Users/Robinsong/VulkanSDK/1.4.350.0/macOS/lib ../core/libmrt_core.a ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /Users/Robinsong/VulkanSDK/1.4.350.0/macOS/lib/libvulkan.dylib ../_deps/tinyobjloader-build/libtinyobjloader.a libimgui_vk.a ../_deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation /Users/Robinsong/VulkanSDK/1.4.350.0/macOS/lib/libvulkan.dylib
